title: Official NitWit SMP Modpack
description:
This Modpack is inteded for the players of the NitWit SMP.
It cointains performance improving mods, shader support, proximity voice chat and visual improvments like added animations.
body:
**NitWit SMP Modpack – Enhanced Multiplayer Experience!**

The **NitWit SMP Modpack** is designed to bring players of the **NitWit SMP** closer together while enhancing both **performance** and **visuals**. This modpack ensures **smooth gameplay**, **immersive interactions**, and a **visually stunning world**—all without straying too far from the **vanilla** feel.

🔊 **Better Communication**
- Integrated **Proximity Voice Chat** for seamless and natural conversations.
- No more relying on external voice apps—talk in-game and immerse yourself in the world!

⚡ **Performance Boosts**
- Optimized with **FPS-enhancing** mods to make the game run smoother.
- Say goodbye to lag and stutters with improved chunk loading and rendering.

🎨 **A More Beautiful Minecraft**
- Enhanced **animations** for player movement, interactions, and mobs.
- **Shader** compatibility to bring dynamic lighting, reflections, and more!
- Subtle visual tweaks that make the world feel more alive.

Whether you're **exploring**, **building**, or battling it out on the **NitWit SMP** Server, this modpack ensures the **best experience** possible! Get ready to play, communicate, and **enjoy Minecraft** like never before!


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) (performance mod)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) (shader support)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) (proximity voice chat)
- [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) by [TreyRuffy](https://modrinth.com/user/TreyRuffy) (clearner debug menu)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) (reworked sound engine)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by [PepperCode1](https://modrinth.com/user/PepperCode1) (connected textures)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) (ingame mod list)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) (3d skin optics)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) (more 1st person animations)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben) (dependency for Fresh Animations)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben) (dependency for Fresh Animations)
- [Server Resource Pack Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-resource-pack-checker) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax)
- [Xaeros World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) by [tehxaero](https://modrinth.com/user/thexaero) (ingame world map)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Resource packs</summary>

- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) by [TrasTick](https://modrinth.com/user/TrasTick)
- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers) by [2DWisp](https://modrinth.com/user/2DWisp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Shader Packs</summary>

- [BVS - Best Vanilla Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bvs) by [LoLip_p](https://modrinth.com/user/LoLip_p)
- [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by [EminGT](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT)
- [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) by [KDXavier](https://modrinth.com/user/KDXavier)

</details>
